Hello!

Hi, my name is LOCHAN GOWDA, a QA Automation Engineer based in Bangalore — dedicated to building scalable, reliable test automation systems and embedding AI-driven testing into every workflow I touch.

My Expertise

Building Modern QA
with Code & AI

Combining automation, AI and cloud-native practices to create bulletproof quality systems.

01

Test Automation Engineering

Selenium + Java + Playwright with BDD Cucumber and POM — built for production scale.

02

AI-Assisted Testing

GitHub Copilot & Claude AI in QA — automating locators, step definitions, and logic at speed.

03

CI/CD Pipeline Integration

Jenkins & GitHub Actions — automated regression on every commit before every release ships.

04

API & Full-Stack Validation

REST API testing, SQL validation, Sauce Labs cloud execution — the full stack, not just the UI.

Featured Work

Projects That Define My Journey

AutomationFintechBDD

Sponsor Onboarding — US Pension Platform

Built 100+ end-to-end automated scenarios for a high-impact US Retirement & Pension application. Scaled regression coverage to 70%+, integrated Jenkins CI/CD, and contributed to 12+ zero-defect production releases.

SeleniumJavaTestNGBDD CucumberJenkinsPostman
AI-DrivenAutomation

AI-Assisted Framework — Employer Preferences App

Converted 220+ manual test steps into optimised automation scenarios using GitHub Copilot, cutting manual effort by 60%. Pioneered AI-assisted QA practices and led team knowledge-sharing sessions.

GitHub CopilotSeleniumBDDPOMClaude AI
BankingCI/CD

Banking Domain Automation — Canada Project

Designing scalable POM + BDD framework architecture for an enterprise Canadian banking engagement. Building reusable component libraries and CI/CD integrations for continuous quality assurance.

SeleniumJavaGitHub ActionsREST APIPlaywright
